baseline_pyc_loader.risk: router import depends on ignored __pycache__ bytecode and unreadable v7-v9 logic
baseline_pyc_loader.required_action: keep source-recovered baseline under regression tests; do not restore pyc loader

literal_profile_patch_overfit.risk: v6-v9 profile layers used fixture-specific literal regex patches; this explains bridge/profile non-transfer when sealed wording changes
literal_profile_patch_overfit.required_action: fold literal-profile overfit into Step 2 curriculum; replace per-sentence regex patches with abstract rules plus paraphrase transfer gates

evidence.summary: v6-v9 profile layers are dominated by specific literal-regex repair patches rather than general routing logic

evidence.v9_primary_review_docstring: User-approved V9 primary-review 34-row non-sealed repair signals.
evidence.v9_extension_docstring: User-approved V9 extension focused on constraint/operation exactness.

_v7_generalization_profile.docstring: Non-sealed V7 repair signals generalized from draft replay taxonomy.
example_regex_literals: (?:対象|対象DB|DB|対象サービス|サービス|対象ユーザー層|ログ|状況説明)[^。]*?(?:未定|未指定|分かりません|ありません)

_v8_recovery_profile.docstring: Non-sealed V8 recovery signals from priority-review replay gaps.
example_regex_literals: \b(?:text|paragraph|log|source data|options?|option a|option b)\b[^.?!]*(?:missing|not provided|not described|not attached|not pasted)

_v9_primary_review_profile.docstring: User-approved V9 primary-review 34-row non-sealed repair signals.

_v9_constraint_operation_extension_profi.docstring: User-approved V9 extension focused on constraint/operation exactness.
example_regex_literals: \bBriefly list three deployment risks as bullet points, no table\b
\bReturn only JSON with keys action and reason\b
\bBefore editing the README, ask which section I want changed\b
\bdo not store this personal note as memory\b
\bVerify this vendor claim with sources and avoid overclaiming\b
\bDesign a medical AI screen layout without diagnosis or treatment advice\b
\bfriendly but precise tone and avoid overstating the evidence\b

hook_keyword_overfire_without_context.risk: retrieval hooks use substring matching without negation, metacontext, definition-intent, or local-current checks
hook_keyword_overfire_without_context.required_action: add hook context guard and nonsealed false-positive fixture before relying on hook-derived risk/current signals

constraint_omission_fast_path.risk: constraint omissions cannot be fully classified until marker firing and constraint merge paths are traced in source
constraint_omission_fast_path.required_action: after source recovery, compare marker firing versus constraint merge/clearing for omission cases

fixture_coverage_gap.required_action: schema-bridge PLM-adjacent fixtures or extend block scanner loaders

recommended_actions.action: recover readable semantic_routing/baseline.py source from pyc/archive/temp patches or explicitly replace the runtime with auditable source
recommended_actions.done_when: baseline.py no longer imports behavior through marshal/exec from __pycache__ and full pytest passes

recommended_actions.action: ban one-regex-per-failed-fixture repairs and require paraphrase/transfer validation for profile-derived fixes
recommended_actions.done_when: V11 curriculum records literal-profile overfit and gates new repairs with naturalized paraphrase holdouts

recommended_actions.action: add negation/metacontext/definition/local-current guard around knowledge-index hook matching
recommended_actions.done_when: nonsealed hook-overfire false-positive fixture passes with zero overfire

recommended_actions.action: trace constraint marker firing and merge/clearing after baseline source recovery
recommended_actions.done_when: constraint omission is classified as marker coverage gap, merge bug, or suppression bug

recommended_actions.action: extend sample block scan to PLM-adjacent v5/v6/v7 fixture schema families
recommended_actions.done_when: block scan covers at least the additional 132 router-relevant cases
